title: CascadePrediction
description: Per-station cascade prediction produced by the ST-GNN.

delay_interval_min.description: Conformal [lower, upper] interval with guaranteed coverage.

data_age_s.description: Staleness watermark — seconds since the underlying data (audit-04 §1).

mode.description: Degradation mode this prediction was produced under.

ood.description: True if produced via the simulator OOD fallback (audit-04 §2).
